en: Don't be afraid to let children try and make mistakes.

zh: 動物的成長往往是由錯誤中學習得來、
en: Animals often grow by learning through their mistakes,

zh: 長久以來傳統的父母總是替孩子安排一切、
en: For generations, traditional parents have arranged everything for their children,

zh: 這樣會減緩孩子的成長、
en: but this actually slows a child's growth.

zh: 因此在安全沒有問題時、
en: So when safety is not a concern,

zh: 從幼兒開始讓孩子嚐試錯誤、
en: letting children try and fail from a young age
is actually a very good thing.
